g.text: 4. Does not know details of LLVM internals
5. Does not implement search logic itself
Common interface for all search algorithms.
New algorithms can be added without changing
Hides low-level LLVM API / CLI calls.
Other classes should not call LLVM directly.
Parses LLVM IR text and extracts metrics.
Stores measurable characteristics of LLVM IR.
Comparison logic is moved to ICostModel.
Represents ordered list of LLVM passes.
Keeps object creation logic outside main().
Creates evaluator and hides construction of:
Prevents huge constructors in user code.
Algorithm receives evaluator and cost model
through context, therefore it stays independent
